creator: tamelingdaniel@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 231688
add the characters form needs_escaping to the word_break argument of the fn_complete2 call

You are right about *. I also checked the source code. There are more characters in the needs_escaping function of libedit, which is used to escape characters in a filename when completing, that are missing from the argument to the fn_complete2 function call: '[', '#', and '?'. When there is a filename with these characters, they get escaped when completed. On further completion attempts, the preceding '\' then gets picked up as word delimiter when these characters are missing from the word_break string. Thus, libedit tries to find completions starting at these characters and not for the whole thing.
